codeReview.summary: Implementation covers the Step 1 constraints form requirements: all required fields/components are present, Zod validation is enforced with inline errors, submit posts to /api/generate/ideas, loading/disabled submit behavior is implemented, and the mock API route returns structured ideas for valid payloads.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The fullstack-worker skill mandates TDD (write failing tests before implementation), but this run implemented feature files before test files and only then added tests; either enforcement/reporting is inconsistent or the procedure should be relaxed to match real workflow.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: Transcript skeleton shows Create/Edit for src/lib/schemas/generation.ts, src/components/constraint-form.tsx, src/app/generate/page.tsx, and src/app/api/generate/ideas/route.ts before creating src/components/constraint-form.test.tsx and src/app/api/generate/ideas/route.test.ts.

sharedStateObservations.observation: Manual browser verification could not validate form interactions because the protected /generate route redirected to sign-in; shared state mentions Clerk test credentials but does not provide retrieval/location guidance, which limits consistent UI verification execution.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: Handoff interactiveChecks records only redirect behavior at /generate; mission AGENTS.md says to use Clerk test credentials but no credential source is documented in shared-state library files.

summary: Reviewed commit 5926851 and transcript for generation-constraint-form. No high-confidence code defects were found against the feature description/expected behavior, so the feature passes review. Added two shared-state observations about skill-procedure alignment and Clerk credential guidance for manual verification.
